headers.comment: Default: HTML/entry files must always revalidate so a tab open across a Railway redeploy fetches the fresh index.html (new hashed chunk names) instead of requesting deleted old chunks → the ChunkErrorBoundary 'cannot be reloaded' screen.
Vite emits content-hashed files under /assets — safe to cache forever (a new build = a new filename). Listed AFTER the catch-all so it overrides the no-cache default for these.
